Pixel-rain: tiny square droplets cascade down in rhythmic patterns
Pixel-embers: glowing orange sparks drift upward from crackling fire
Pixel-fireflies: clustered yellow dots pulse and float through darkness
Pixel-fog: rolling blocky haze obscures distant pixelated landscape slowly
Pixel-cherry-blossom-storm: pink petals swirl in dense cascading tornado
Pixel-aurora-wisp: shimmering green ribbons wave across the night sky
Pixel-lightning-arcs: jagged white bolts flicker and branch across clouds
Pixel-ash-fall: gray flakes descend from burning sky above ruins
Pixel-soul-wisp: ethereal blue trails spiral upward toward moonlight
Scanline-glow: horizontal CRT lines pulse rhythmically across entire screen
Pixel-snow: delicate white flakes tumble softly through cold air
Pixel-dust: golden motes swirl lazily within warm sunbeam shaft
Pixel-steam: white blocky vapor rises gently from hot surface
Pixel-bubbles: translucent spheres wobble upward through deep blue water
Pixel-leaves: autumn-colored squares spiral down in gentle breeze
Pixel-starfall: silver streaks shoot diagonally across midnight canvas
Pixel-dragon-smoke: purple-tinted clouds billow outward in heavy plumes
Pixel-ice-crystals: sharp geometric fragments sparkle while descending slowly
Pixel-pollen: tiny yellow specks drift lazily through meadow air
Pixel-butterflies: colorful winged sprites flutter erratically through garden space
Pixel-blood-red ember-rain: crimson sparks fall like burning tears downward

Pixel-energy-arcs: crackling cyan bolts snap between charged objects wildly
